offer: For Amazon sellers processing 10–20 invoices/month, inefficient supplier performance tracking causes missed discounts. We provide monthly reports instead of manual tracking and spreadsheets.
problem: Difficulty in tracking supplier performance and identifying cost-saving opportunities.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities where Amazon sellers seek help
Indie Hackers posts and comments on similar workflows
DM outreach to Amazon sellers with demo video
Community forums where sellers share tools
try_it: Let users try supplier performance tracking on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: 1-page landing page with the one-liner and CTA
Short demo video showing the manual workflow
Collect 10 short interviews from target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Post weekly progress updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: One-click export of a simple report
